title: Zuri's New Friend
synopsis: Zuri feels nervous about making friends at a new playground, but with encouragement from her grandmother, she learns that being kind and sharing can lead to wonderful friendships. A heartwarming story about overcoming shyness and discovering the joy of new connections.

pages.text: Zuri held Grandma's hand tight as they walked to the new park. She had never been here before. The playground looked big and bright with red slides and blue swings.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes walking hand-in-hand with her grandmother toward a colorful playground with red slides and blue swings, diverse children playing in the background
illustration.alt: Zuri and her grandmother approaching a bright playground

pages.text: "Look at all those children playing," said Grandma with a smile. "They look like they're having so much fun!" Zuri watched the kids running and laughing together.

illustration.description: A bright sunny playground scene with diverse kids playing on swings and slides, Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes standing beside her grandmother watching the joyful activities
illustration.alt: Children playing happily at the playground while Zuri observes

pages.text: Zuri wanted to play, but she felt butterflies in her tummy. "What if they don't want to play with me?" she whispered to Grandma. The other kids looked like they were having so much fun.

illustration.description: Close-up of Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes looking uncertain while diverse children play energetically in the background on playground equipment in bright primary colors
illustration.alt: Zuri looking shy while other children play in the background

pages.text: Grandma gave her a gentle hug. "Sweet Zuri, you are kind and wonderful. Sometimes making friends means taking the first brave step. What do you think?"

illustration.description: Grandma hugging Zuri who has natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes, with the bright sunny playground and diverse children visible in the background, lots of white space around them
illustration.alt: Grandmother comforting Zuri with a warm hug

pages.text: Zuri took a deep breath and walked toward the swings. A girl with curly red hair was sitting alone on one swing. She looked a little sad too.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes walking toward park swings where a girl with curly red hair sits alone, bright primary colors and white space, other diverse kids playing in the distance
illustration.alt: Zuri approaching a girl sitting alone on the swings

pages.text: "Hi," said Zuri softly. "I'm new here. Would you like to swing together?" The girl looked up and smiled. "I'm Maya! I'd love to swing with you!"

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes talking to Maya, a girl with curly red hair, both standing by the bright blue swings, joyful expressions, sunny playground atmosphere
illustration.alt: Zuri and Maya meeting by the swings

pages.text: Zuri and Maya swung high up to the clouds! They laughed and talked about their favorite colors and foods. Maya loved purple and pizza. Zuri loved yellow and apples.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes and Maya swinging high on bright blue swings, both laughing with joy, diverse kids playing in the bright sunny playground background
illustration.alt: Zuri and Maya swinging together and laughing

pages.text: "Want to go down the slide?" asked Maya. They climbed up together and whooshed down the red slide. "Again! Again!" they both shouted with big smiles.

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes and Maya going down a bright red slide together, arms up in excitement, other diverse children playing on playground equipment with primary colors
illustration.alt: Zuri and Maya sliding down the red slide together

pages.text: Soon, more children came to play with them. They all played tag and shared snacks. Zuri felt so happy she had been brave enough to say hello first.

illustration.description: Group of diverse kids including Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes playing together on the bright sunny playground, sharing snacks, lots of laughter and friendship activities with primary colors
illustration.alt: Zuri playing with a group of diverse children

pages.text: When it was time to go home, Maya gave Zuri a big hug. "Will you come back tomorrow?" she asked. "Yes!" said Zuri. "I can't wait to play again!"

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes hugging Maya goodbye, with Grandma waiting nearby, bright sunny playground setting with white space, joyful and inclusive atmosphere
illustration.alt: Zuri and Maya hugging goodbye at the playground

pages.text: Walking home with Grandma, Zuri skipped with joy. "I made a new friend today!" she said proudly. Grandma smiled. "I knew you would, sweet girl. You have such a kind heart."

illustration.description: Zuri with natural coily hair in an afro with a flower clip, deep brown skin, bright eyes skipping happily beside her grandmother as they leave the bright playground, diverse children still playing in the background, primary colors and white space
illustration.alt: Zuri skipping home happily with her grandmother

metadata.illustrationStyle: bright sunny playground, diverse kids playing, primary colors, white space, joyful energetic, inclusive, park swings slides, laughter, friendship activities

questions.question: How did Zuri feel when she first saw the new playground?
questions.explanation: Zuri felt butterflies in her tummy and was worried the other kids might not want to play with her.

questions.question: Who encouraged Zuri to be brave?
questions.explanation: Grandma told Zuri she was kind and wonderful and that making friends sometimes means taking the first brave step.

questions.question: What was the first thing Zuri and Maya did together?
questions.explanation: After Zuri introduced herself, she and Maya swung together high up to the clouds.

questions.question: What are Maya's favorite color and food?
questions.explanation: Maya told Zuri that she loved purple and pizza, while Zuri loved yellow and apples.

questions.question: How did Zuri feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: Zuri skipped with joy and proudly told Grandma that she had made a new friend.
